sidebar.title: MCP Inspector
sidebar.connectionTypeTip: Connect to server directly (requires CORS config on server) or via MCP Inspector Proxy
sidebar.connectionError: Connection Error - Check if your MCP server is running and proxy token is correct
sidebar.connectionErrorNoToken: Connection Error - Did you add the proxy session token in Configuration?
sidebar.errorConnectingToProxy: Error Connecting to MCP Inspector Proxy - Check Console logs
sidebar.reportBugs: Report bugs or contribute on GitHub
sidebar.configEntryCopiedStdio: Server configuration has been copied to clipboard. Add this to your mcp.json inside the 'mcpServers' object with your preferred server name.
sidebar.configEntryCopiedStreamableHttp: Streamable HTTP URL has been copied. Use this URL directly in your MCP Client.
sidebar.configEntryCopiedSse: SSE URL has been copied. Use this URL directly in your MCP Client.
sidebar.serversFileCopiedDesc: Servers configuration has been copied to clipboard. Add this to your mcp.json file. Current testing server will be added as 'default-server'

tools.title: Tools
tools.noToolSelected: Select a tool from the list to view its details

annotations.readOnlyDesc: Tool does not modify its environment
annotations.destructiveDesc: Tool may perform destructive updates (delete/overwrite data)
annotations.idempotentDesc: Calling repeatedly with same args has no additional effect
annotations.openWorldDesc: Tool may interact with external entities beyond its local environment

tools.copyInputErrorDesc: There was an error copying input to the clipboard: {{error}}

prompts.title: Prompts
prompts.selectPromptFromList: Select a prompt from the list to view and use it

resources.title: Resources
resources.selectResourceFromList: Select a resource or template from the list to view its contents

roots.title: Roots
roots.description: Configure the root directories that the server can access

sampling.description: When the server requests LLM sampling, requests will appear here for approval.

elicitations.description: When the server requests information from the user, requests will appear here for response.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Key-value pairs that will be included in all MCP requests

customHeaders.title: Custom Headers
customHeaders.headersHint: Use the toggle to enable/disable headers. Only enabled headers with both name and value will be sent.
customHeaders.jsonHint: Enter headers as a JSON object with string key-value pairs.
customHeaders.jsonError: JSON must be an object with string key-value pairs

jsonView.copyErrorDesc: There was an error copying result into the clipboard: {{error}}

common.noCapabilities: The connected server does not support any MCP capabilities
common.connectToServer: Connect to an MCP server to start inspecting
